query:
-- Verify no un-normalized phones remain in clients
SELECT 'clients' as tbl, COUNT(*) as unnormalized_count
FROM clients
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' AND phone NOT LIKE '+%'
UNION ALL
-- Verify no un-normalized phones remain in client_accounts
SELECT 'client_accounts' as tbl, COUNT(*) as unnormalized_count
FROM client_accounts
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' AND phone NOT LIKE '+%'
UNION ALL
-- Verify no un-normalized phones remain in business_owners
SELECT 'business_owners' as tbl, COUNT(*) as unnormalized_count
FROM business_owners
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' AND phone NOT LIKE '+%';
